misc: Bags Miura irons and is rumoured to sleep with them.
biography: From the distinguished fairways of Hirsala Golf, Miso has established himself as a seasoned competitor within the Hector Trophée, having participated in ten previous editions of this unique pairs competition.

Across these numerous engagements, Miso has reached the pinnacle of team success, lifting the coveted Hector Trophée on one memorable occasion. This singular triumph underscores his capacity for strategic partnership and execution under pressure, though the individual Victor Trophy has, to date, remained just beyond his grasp.

Miso's meticulous approach to the game is further exemplified by his choice of equipment; he is widely known to bag Miura irons, a brand synonymous with exceptional craftsmanship and feel. Indeed, his dedication to these finely forged tools is legendary, with persistent rumors suggesting an almost inseparable bond, even extending to his repose, a testament to his profound appreciation for golf's tactile artistry.

While Miso will not be among the field for the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, marking a temporary pause in his dedicated journey, his contributions to the tournament's history are significant. As an active and respected figure within Hector events, the prospect of his return to the challenging greens in future editions remains a compelling possibility, ensuring his legacy as a committed and accomplished competitor endures.
